goal_steps.name: cloudless official ecCKD ecRad accuracy
goal_steps.definition: Pass hard cloudless/no-aerosol ecRad thresholds with official ecCKD inputs.

goal_steps.name: 32-g ecCKD/RRTMGP-compatible gas optics
goal_steps.definition: Use the validated official ecCKD 32-g production model, freeze the 16-g model as a diagnostic, and emit direct RRTMGP comparison metrics on the same column ensemble.

goal_steps.name: all-sky IFS conventions plus Breeze H100 4x
goal_steps.definition: Pass current IFS all-sky cloud/aerosol/scattering/overlap solver thresholds and demonstrate >=4x H100 Breeze speedup over RRTMGP on a realistic RCEMIP-style workload.

prompt_artifact_checklist.requirement: Plan reviewed and concrete three-step /goal captured
prompt_artifact_checklist.completion_criteria: The project plan and audit list the three concrete goal gates with current status.

prompt_artifact_checklist.requirement: Hard cloudless/no-aerosol official ecCKD accuracy thresholds
prompt_artifact_checklist.completion_criteria: Official ecCKD clear/cloudless hard-gate artifacts pass.
Reference manifest, upstream ecRad checkout, candidate schema, and official ecCKD files are present and valid.
The package-native RRTMGP extension and direct comparison test are implemented.

prompt_artifact_checklist.requirement: Fresh dedicated Breeze checkout and Breeze-owned extension
prompt_artifact_checklist.completion_criteria: Old ABR Breeze extension is absent and the fresh Breeze checkout owns BreezeRadiativeHeatingExt.

evidence.artifact: Breeze tabulated ecCKD column amount conversion

prompt_artifact_checklist.requirement: Host-model access points for external solvers and vertical integrals
prompt_artifact_checklist.completion_criteria: Access-point validation passes without unexported required APIs.

The official ecCKD 32-g production path passes ecRad/ecCKD hard thresholds, the 16-g model is frozen as diagnostic evidence, and direct RRTMGP comparison metrics are emitted on the same column ensemble.

evidence.artifact: reduced ecCKD subset search threshold status

prompt_artifact_checklist.completion_criteria: Toy and official reduced optimization checks show Reactant and Enzyme availability, and full 16-g calibration against the RRTMGP/package reference is demonstrated.
Toy training passes, and an official/reduced ecCKD gas-optics training artifact demonstrates the production path.
Cloud/scattering diagnostics, final IFS all-sky gate, and all-sky solver/reference-optics evidence pass.

prompt_artifact_checklist.requirement: Validated ecCKD Breeze CPU and H100 support path
prompt_artifact_checklist.completion_criteria: Validated ecCKD metadata flows through Breeze, CPU support is verified, and H100 tabulated multi-gas support is no longer blocked.

prompt_artifact_checklist.requirement: Realistic RCEMIP-style H100 4x RRTMGP comparison with Nsight profiling
prompt_artifact_checklist.completion_criteria: Final 1024-column RCEMIP-style H100 artifact supports >=4x over RRTMGP with validated ecCKD and Nsight Systems/Compute reports.

artifacts.blocker_reason: current IFS all-sky cloud/aerosol/scattering/overlap solver gate has not passed

artifacts.name: official/reduced ecCKD gas-optics training
artifacts.blocker_reason: production official/reduced ecCKD training improves the objective but has not quantitatively recovered a published model

artifacts.name: full Reactant/Enzyme RRTMGP-target 16-g calibration
artifacts.blocker_reason: full Reactant/Enzyme gradient-descent calibration of the 16-g model against the RRTMGP/package reference has not been demonstrated

artifacts.name: package-native RRTMGP comparison extension
artifacts.blocker_reason: RRTMGP extension for direct ColumnAtmosphere/RadiativeFluxes comparisons is not implemented

artifacts.name: Breeze RCEMIP H100 4x acceptance
artifacts.blocker_reason: H100 RCEMIP artifact is still marked as scaffold evidence, not final production 4x evidence

artifacts.name: Breeze RCEMIP gas model metadata
artifacts.blocker_reason: final H100 benchmark must use a validated ecCKD gas model, not synthetic fixed coefficients
